title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IIT Kanpur - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IIT Kanpur - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
IIT Kanpur, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Meerut operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIT Kanpur:
IIT Kanpur is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Support students with special educational needs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Kanpur!
